productDisplayName: Locomotive Men Check Lafayette Blue Shirts
description: CompositionTeal blue and white plaid check full sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, has grey, light yellow and black accents, tape detailing on the in-seam of the collar, patch pocket on the left chest with buttoned flap, full length buttoned placket, sleeves with buttoned cuffs, buttons on the elbows and a curved hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this teal blue and white plaid check shirt from highlander. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. The sleeves can be rolled up to give a different look.
